warnings.message: proposal.md and .qa.yaml use '/api/v1/menus/*' but actual mounted prefix is '/api/v1/menu' (singular, per app/api/v1/__init__.py:18). Downstream API planning MUST use '/api/v1/menu/list', '/api/v1/menu/get', '/api/v1/menu/create', '/api/v1/menu/update', '/api/v1/menu/delete'.

Auth uses a raw 'token' header (not 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'). proposal.md mentions 'Authorization header' / 'Bearer token' which is incorrect per app/core/dependency.py:13 and app/core/middlewares.py:146. Downstream API plan MUST set request header 'token: <jwt>' directly.

case.yaml correctly uses natural language descriptions (no concrete paths embedded). The path/header mismatches above are not a forbidden-content violation in case.yaml — they only need correction in plan documents during Phase 4 (deferred under case-only run mode).
